question: The chart displays the percentage of people who prefer different Valentine’s gifts. Based on the percentages shown, which statement is correct?

options.A: Flowers have the highest preference among all the categories.
options.B: Cards have the highest preference among all the categories.
options.C: Gift Card has the highest preference among all the categories.
options.D: Clothing has a higher preference than Candy.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
